# Code of Conduct

We want this project to be a welcoming, respectful space for everyone.

Please be kind, constructive, and respectful in issues, pull requests, and any project-related discussions. Harassment, hate speech, personal attacks, and other disruptive behavior will not be tolerated.

If you witness or experience unacceptable behavior, please report it privately on Discord: [discord.com/users/1259042265771540490](https://discord.com/users/1259042265771540490).

By participating in this project, you agree to follow this Code of Conduct.
